title: Revert all settings to Version 44

requirements.text: Fully revert the entire frontend to its Version 44 state — restore all component styles, animations, CSS custom properties, Tailwind configuration, and layout settings exactly as they were in Version 44, undoing any changes introduced in Version 45 or Version 46.

quotes: 44 wala version wala kar Pagal sari setting kyun Kharab kardi Tum ne

acceptanceCriteria: All frontend components (HeroSection, Navbar, AboutSection, RosterSection, NewsSection, Footer, etc.) match Version 44 exactly.
CSS custom properties in index.css and src/index.css match Version 44 values.
Tailwind configuration in tailwind.config.js matches Version 44 values.
HeroSection shooting animation is identical to Version 44.
No visual or behavioral differences remain from any post-Version-44 changes.

constraints: Do not modify any backend files.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Introducing any new features or changes beyond restoring Version 44 state.
Modifying backend logic or data models.
